_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-14 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Strike interval is an approximation — verify actual listed strikes in Kite option chain. No lot size shown (not available from any live source) — figures are per-share, not total cost. ⚠ LIQUIDITY UNVERIFIED — no open-interest or bid-ask data exists anywhere in this system; this strike is chosen by moneyness only and may be thin or wide-spread. Check the live option chain before assuming it's fillable near this premium.
ICICIBANK.commentary: BUY_PE (4/6 votes): price 1392.6 is above EMA18 (1380.29) and EMA50 (1340.78) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (24.94) is below its signal line (27.58) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price broke below pivot support S1 (1392.87) -- breakdown confirmed (+2 PE) | 5-day momentum (ROC5 -1.56%) is strongly negative (+1 PE) ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.
